access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction uses abstract-level results for this baseline pass.

name: Effects of tadalafil administration on plasma markers of exercise-induced muscle damage, IL6 and antioxidant status capacity.
summary: Double-blind crossover trial in healthy males testing tadalafil 20 mg/day given as two doses 36 hours apart before exhaustive exercise, assessing antioxidant status, oxidative damage, muscle damage markers, LDH, CK, MDA, protein carbonyls, and IL-6.
